id: update-ai-edit

description: "Called by the frontend after the user resolves the diff"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Record accept/reject for a streamed AI edit (ASK-215)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/study-guides/{study_guide_id}/ai/edits/{edit_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Called by the frontend after the user resolves the diff
overlay. Sets `accepted` + `accepted_at` on the audit row.
Idempotent -- last write wins, so a misclick can be
corrected by PATCHing again.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
